summary: Beefier‑sounding pull with solid mids and bass response; no performance details provided.
review: The reviewer praises this version for its richer low end compared to the mk41 Bryant source, noting the mids and highs remain crisp. No comments are made about the musical performance itself, so the analysis focuses on the recording’s tonal balance.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 4‑star review mentions a favorable tonal quality; no information on the show itself, so rating leans toward recording strength but remains modest.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as beefier sounding with solid bass response and crisp mids/highs; no specific issues noted.
